calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Linda Y. Chan, Esq. special appearance for and with the Plaintiff Sason parandian and with Witness Aftob A. Malik.
Plaintiff and Witness were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Livestar entertainment Events International, Inc. as follows:
Damages $5,000.000.00
Punitive damages $2,000,000.00 for a total of $7,000,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.
